description: ARIS Animal Health — Outbreaks, surveillance, lab results, vaccinations

targets.rawSql:
SELECT he.status, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM animal_health.health_events he
WHERE ($country = 'ALL' OR he.country_code = $country)
  AND ($disease = 'ALL' OR he.disease_name = $disease)
  AND he.created_at >= $__timeFrom() AND he.created_at <= $__timeTo()
  AND ('${tenant_id}' = '*' OR he.tenant_id::text IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring}))
GROUP BY he.status
ORDER BY count DESC;

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', he.event_date) AS time,
       SUM(he.cases) AS cases,
       SUM(he.deaths) AS deaths
FROM animal_health.health_events he
WHERE ($country = 'ALL' OR he.country_code = $country)
  AND ($disease = 'ALL' OR he.disease_name = $disease)
  AND he.event_date >= $__timeFrom() AND he.event_date <= $__timeTo()
  AND ('${tenant_id}' = '*' OR he.tenant_id::text IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring}))
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT ROUND(
  100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE lr.result = 'positive') / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0),
  1
) AS positivity_rate
FROM animal_health.lab_results lr
WHERE ($country = 'ALL' OR lr.country_code = $country)
  AND lr.created_at >= $__timeFrom() AND lr.created_at <= $__timeTo()
  AND ('${tenant_id}' = '*' OR lr.tenant_id::text IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring}));

SELECT s.surveillance_type AS type, COUNT(*) AS reports
FROM animal_health.surveillances s
WHERE ($country = 'ALL' OR s.country_code = $country)
  AND s.created_at >= $__timeFrom() AND s.created_at <= $__timeTo()
  AND ('${tenant_id}' = '*' OR s.tenant_id::text IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring}))
GROUP BY s.surveillance_type
ORDER BY reports DESC;

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', v.vaccination_date) AS time,
       SUM(v.doses_administered) AS doses
FROM animal_health.vaccinations v
WHERE ($country = 'ALL' OR v.country_code = $country)
  AND v.vaccination_date >= $__timeFrom() AND v.vaccination_date <= $__timeTo()
  AND ('${tenant_id}' = '*' OR v.tenant_id::text IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring}))
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT he.disease_name AS disease,
       he.country_code AS country,
       he.status,
       he.cases,
       he.deaths,
       he.species_name AS species,
       he.event_date,
       he.confidence_level
FROM animal_health.health_events he
WHERE ($country = 'ALL' OR he.country_code = $country)
  AND ($disease = 'ALL' OR he.disease_name = $disease)
  AND he.created_at >= $__timeFrom() AND he.created_at <= $__timeTo()
  AND ('${tenant_id}' = '*' OR he.tenant_id::text IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring}))
ORDER BY he.event_date DESC
LIMIT 50;

list.name: tenant_id
list.label: Tenant
list.description: Tenant ID filter injected by ARIS proxy

list.name: country
list.query: SELECT 'ALL' AS __value, 'All Countries' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT code AS __value, code AS __text FROM governance.countries WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY 2;

list.name: disease
list.query: SELECT 'ALL' AS __value, 'All Diseases' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT disease_name AS __value, disease_name AS __text FROM animal_health.health_events ORDER BY 2;

title: ARIS Animal Health
